elements.description: แผงเมนสวิตช์ (LP), +1.80M, located at the จอดรถ/พักผ่อน boundary wall, feeding circuit '1/LP' onward (arrow shown)
Feed 2-2.5 NYY-Ø25mm.PVC from LP panel down through the slab/wall to a weatherproof bell switch (SB, circled) near the bottom edge of the plan below เฉลียง

Circled-cross (⊕) downlight symbols scattered through the plan, individually lettered: two labeled 'h' side-by-side in the upper part of นอน 1, two labeled 'g' lower in นอน 1 (with a 'g,h' tag at their shared wiring junction near the นอน1/corridor wall), one point near the top of นอน 2 and one labeled 'd' lower in that same area, one labeled 'k' in ซักล้าง, a small cluster labeled 'c,d,e' plus separate 'c'/'f' points near the room with the sink/counter icon (likely ห้องน้ำ or a wash area) and เตรียมอาหาร, two labeled 'b' side-by-side in พักผ่อน
elements.grid_ref: นอน 1 (2x 'h' + 2x 'g'), นอน 2 (~2 points incl. 'd'), ซักล้าง (1x 'k'), เตรียมอาหาร/wash-area cluster (~3 points 'c,d,e'/'f'), พักผ่อน (2x 'b')

elements.description: Short bold linear (LED-tube-style) symbols: one labeled 'e' near จอดรถ, one labeled 'd' near เฉลียง entrance -- distinct from the circled downlight points

Small unfilled square symbol near the bottom-left corner of the plan (below row A, near the 'ขึ้น' stair-up arrow), presumed a wall switch; a 'j,k' tag with a left-right arrow also appears near the ซักล้าง/นอน2 stair area, plus the SB weatherproof bell switch near เฉลียง/the property-line entrance

warnings: GRID CONFIRMATION (independent, matches t2's revised read, disagrees with t1): the printed dimension chain on this page is identical to หน้า29 (horizontal 1.30+4.00+3.00+1.30 under grid 1/2/3; vertical 1.50+4.00+bracket(2.00+3.50)+1.50+1.50 below grid A) and matches the building grid master (หน้า00_gridline.json) exactly, including the position of the A'/A'' dummy-grid extension (this page itself does not print A'/A'' labels, same caveat as noted on หน้า29_floor_plan.json). This is my own independent read of the raw numbers, confirming t2's conclusion over t1's free-text treatment.

This sheet is a symbol-routing plan, not a quantity/fixture-count schedule -- the exact letter-to-fixture correspondence (which lowercase letter switch loop controls which downlight) is difficult to resolve precisely at this image resolution and is not being asserted as a verified count. Do not infer a bill-of-quantities fixture count from this file without zooming in on the source drawing.
Fixture types themselves (downlight vs LED tube spec) are defined on the EE-01 symbol legend, not repeated here.

The room containing the sink/counter icon near the 'c,d,e' cluster is not clearly text-labeled on this sheet (partially obscured by the fixture symbols); inferred as a wash/prep area adjacent to เตรียมอาหาร based on position, not a confirmed room name -- flagged for zoom-review.
